title: Low Mace
description: Makes your mace very small by better PVP experience.
body:
### **Low Mace - tiny mace in first-person view for Minecraft.**

If the default mace blocks too much of your screen, this pack fixes that. It makes the mace much smaller in your hand so you can actually see what you’re doing, especially in fights and PVP.

![compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3957c0f1ef72dcb5544aba93b9a855242b134c0f.png)
## [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/low-mace)
